title: A Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) and Association of Municipal Employees of Los Baños, Laguna (AMELBA-UNA), Inc. joint Resolution No. 2025 - 04 dated December 15, 2025, entitled: "Resolution prescribing the rate of collective negotiation agreement incentive for FY 2025 in the amount of Thirty Thousand pesos (Php 30,000.00) or pro-rated based on the prescribed CNA computation
